name: inferChain
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'commonsense.inferChain'. KnowledgeBaseWorkbench.tsx sends {maxHops,minConfidence} (flat params, NOT artifact-wrapped) and reads {inferences:[{subject,relation,relationLabel,object,confidence,hops,rationale,derivation:[{subject,relation,object,confidence}]}],count,baseFactCount,maxHops,minConfidence} — verified aligned. Transitive-relation closure over the per-user fact store: BFS chains seed.subject --rel--> ... up to maxHops, confidence = product of edge confidences, dedupes against known + derived. maxHops clamped [1,5], minConfidence clamped [0,1] so poisoned '1e999'/'Infinity'/-1 collapse to a valid bound; empty store → {inferences:[],count:0}. Already behaviorally pinned by server/tests/commonsense-domain-parity.test.js; authored spec documents the component contract for the lens gate.
